content.text:
Cannot proceed - device is stuck on AOD lock screen and won't wake up; this also appears to be a Chinese MIUI device which is unlikely to have VLC installed for AndroidWorld testing.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device stuck on Always-On Display lock screen showing time '17:4x' and a USB notification; swipes, taps, ai_click and open_app all failed to wake/unlock the screen, so VLC could not be opened and no playlist could be created.", "screenshot_paths": ["MCP get_screenshot returned a near-black AOD lock screen image"], "failure_reason": "Device stuck on locked AOD screen — no power-key tool available to wake it, swipe-up unlock did not transition the screen, so VLC could not be launched to create the 'My Videos' playlist."}

result:
Cannot proceed - device is stuck on AOD lock screen and won't wake up; this also appears to be a Chinese MIUI device which is unlikely to have VLC installed for AndroidWorld testing.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device stuck on Always-On Display lock screen showing time '17:4x' and a USB notification; swipes, taps, ai_click and open_app all failed to wake/unlock the screen, so VLC could not be opened and no playlist could be created.", "screenshot_paths": ["MCP get_screenshot returned a near-black AOD lock screen image"], "failure_reason": "Device stuck on locked AOD screen — no power-key tool available to wake it, swipe-up unlock did not transition the screen, so VLC could not be launched to create the 'My Videos' playlist."}
